market_scan.notes: Queried same-day NBA, MLB, NFL, and NHL events from Optimal Bet; ranked game markets and explicitly expanded player_odds/player_projections for all available player props. Final ranking deduplicated player prop bet families by event/player/prop/side and cross-checked selected totals against other sportsbook totals. NFL returned no events.

picks.reasoning: Why this made the card: Kelly Oubre Jr. Assists Over 2.5 is a player prop priced at DraftKings +600. That price is break-even at 14.3%, while the model has it at 52.3% — a +38.1 percentage-point cushion and +266.4% expected value. Projection support: 2.54 assists median; p25 2.12 / p75 2.96 versus the listed line Over 2.5. Distribution check: distribution p25 2.12 / p50 2.54 / p75 2.96. Model note: Cross-book check: Kelly Oubre Jr. assists overs were grouped as one bet family, so only one Oubre assists over appears on the card. The 2.5 total is available at several books, including DraftKings/Onyx +600, bet365 +575, Sportsbook Rhode Island +550, and Hard Rock +525; other alternate totals exist, so verify the exact 2.5 market before betting. Context: matchup PHI @ BOS; team PHI. Risk note: this is still a probabilistic edge, not a lock; it stays on the card because it cleared the 50%+ win-probability rule, stale-line guardrails, and ranked by EV.
